title: I’m More Than a Bit Worried About the Typhoon That’s About to Hit a Group of U.S. Islands
description: Though the islands have scandal-ridden pasts, climate change doesn’t distinguish between exploited workers and crooked government officials.
content: Its been a long time since the U.S. Commonwealth of the Northern Marianas Islands was up in the news. The last time I recall is back in the days of Jack Abramoff and Speaker Tom DeLaylook them up, ki… [+2996 chars]

title: Typhoon No. 4 Set to Approach Saipan Before Turning Toward Japan
description: Typhoon No. 4 (Sinlaku), a large and extremely powerful system, is moving west-northwest over the Mariana Islands and is expected to make its closest approach to Saipan on April 15th while maintaining its intense strength. (News On Japan)
content:
TOKYO, Apr 14 (News On Japan) -
 Typhoon No. 4 (Sinlaku), a large and extremely powerful system, is moving west-northwest over the Mariana Islands and is expected to make its closest approach to Sai… [+1494 chars]
de: Taifun Nr. 4 nähert sich Saipan, bevor er sich Japan zuwendet. Taifun Nr. 4 (Sinlaku), ein großes und extrem starkes System, bewegt sich von West nach Nordwesten über die Marianen und wird voraussichtlich am 15. April Saipan am nächsten kommen und dabei seine enorme Stärke beibehalten. (Neuigkeiten über Japan)
en: Typhoon No. 4 Set to Approach Saipan Before Turning Toward Japan. Typhoon No. 4 (Sinlaku), a large and extremely powerful system, is moving west-northwest over the Mariana Islands and is expected to make its closest approach to Saipan on April 15th while maintaining its intense strength. (News On Japan)
la: Typhoon No. 4 pone ad accedere Saipan ante Conversus ad Iaponiae. Typhoon N. 4 (Sinlaku), ratio magna et praepotens, in insulis Marianis ad septentrionem occidentalem movetur et expectatur ut proxime accederet ad Saipan die 15 mensis Aprilis, servata intensa vi. (News On Japan)

title: Monster typhoon in the Pacific Ocean is bearing down on group of remote US islands
description: Super Typhoon Sinlaku is forecast to bring strong winds and heavy rain to the Northern Mariana Islands, a remote US territory in the Pacific.
content:
SAIPAN, Northern Mariana Islands: A dangerous super typhoon in the Pacific Ocean is barrelling toward a group of remote US islands.
Super Typhoon Sinlaku is expected to make landfall Tuesday in the … [+1499 chars]
de: Ein gewaltiger Taifun im Pazifischen Ozean rast auf eine Gruppe abgelegener US-Inseln zu. Der Supertaifun Sinlaku wird den Nördlichen Marianen, einem abgelegenen US-Territorium im Pazifik, voraussichtlich starke Winde und starken Regen bescheren.
en: Monster typhoon in the Pacific Ocean is bearing down on group of remote US islands. Super Typhoon Sinlaku is forecast to bring strong winds and heavy rain to the Northern Mariana Islands, a remote US territory in the Pacific.
la: Typhon monstrum in Oceano Pacifico defert in coetus insularum US remotarum. Eximius Typhoon Sinlaku praenuntiat ut ventos validos et pluvias graves in Insulas Marianas Septentrionales, remotum US territorium in Pacifico ferat.
